name: Nederlanders Tap & Golf - Pella
about: Nederlanders Tap & Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring three AG Simulators where patrons can hit the range, play mini games, or enjoy rounds on some of the world's most famous courses. The venue operates in a laid-back atmosphere with a full-service bar, food menu, and multiple large-screen TVs. It is designed to be a social hub for friends, family, or colleagues, with offerings that extend beyond golf to include craft beers, cocktails, and food items. While it serves all skill levels, the primary focus is on providing a casual, year-round golf and social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to world-famous golf courses
Laid-back social atmosphere with a full bar and food menu
Three AG Simulators for a premium experience
Options for all skill levels including mini games
Convenient booking options for solo or group play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with specialty gourmet hot dogs, delicious munchies, savory traditional and boneless wings.
Full-service bar with local craft beers, domestic beers, craft cocktails, mules, and more.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three AG Simulators available for range, mini games, and famous courses.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and kitchen, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but indoor golf typically takes 2-3 hours depending on the simulator and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Nederlanders Tap & Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for all skill levels, including juniors.
